headline: **MLB Daily Roundup: May 9, 2026**
article:
The Houston Astros dominated the Cincinnati Reds, securing a 10-0 victory behind Mike Burrows' strong pitching performance. In other action, the Colorado Rockies rallied past the Philadelphia Phillies 9-7, while the Oakland Athletics edged the Baltimore Orioles 4-3. The Los Angeles Angels fell short in Toronto, losing 0-2 to the Blue Jays.

Injuries and availability continue to impact teams, with several key players landing on the injured list. Bennett Sousa, a left-handed pitcher for the Houston Astros, has been placed on the 15-day injured list due to left elbow inflammation. Other notable injuries include Taj Bradley (Minnesota Twins), Tyler Glasnow (Los Angeles Dodgers), Jake Mangum (Pittsburgh Pirates), Cade Povich (Baltimore Orioles), Travis d'Arnaud (Los Angeles Angels), Cole Ragans (Kansas City Royals), and Jasson Domínguez (New York Yankees).

Several trades and roster moves have taken place, including the San Francisco Giants trading catcher Patrick Bailey to the Cleveland Guardians in exchange for left-handed pitcher Matt Wilkinson and other considerations. The Baltimore Orioles acquired right-handed pitchers Enyel Garcia and Maicol Lauriano from the Philadelphia Phillies in a cash deal. The Chicago Cubs received right-handed pitcher Tyler Ferguson from the Athletics, while the Tampa Bay Rays traded right-handed pitcher Yoendrys Gómez to the Minnesota Twins for cash.

top_news.title: **Astros Shut Out Reds 10-0**
top_news.summary: The Houston Astros dominated the Cincinnati Reds, securing a 10-0 victory. Mike Burrows led the Astros' pitching effort, throwing 7.0 innings with 6 strikeouts and 0 earned runs.

top_news.title: **Rockies Rally Past Phillies 9-7**
top_news.summary: The Colorado Rockies secured a thrilling 9-7 victory over the Philadelphia Phillies, with Hunter Goodman leading the offense and Chase Dollander pitching a strong 5.2 innings.

top_news.title: **Athletics Edge Orioles in Thrilling 4-3 Victory**
top_news.summary: The Oakland Athletics secured a narrow win over the Baltimore Orioles, with Jacob Lopez earning the win and Hogan Harris securing the save.

top_news.title: **Angels Fall Short in Toronto**
top_news.summary: The Los Angeles Angels suffered a 0-2 loss to the Toronto Blue Jays, with Kazuma Okamoto leading the team with 1 hit, 1 RBI, and 3 at-bats. Dylan Cease earned the win for the Blue Jays, pitching 7.0 innings with 10 strikeouts, 0 earned runs, and 0 walks.

top_news.title: **Astros Place Bennett Sousa on 15-Day Injured List**
top_news.summary: The Houston Astros have placed left-handed pitcher Bennett Sousa on the 15-day injured list due to left elbow inflammation, effective retroactive to May 6, 2026. This move aims to allow Sousa time to recover and return to the team's active roster.

top_news.title: **Giants Make Key Trade**
top_news.summary: The San Francisco Giants traded catcher Patrick Bailey to the Cleveland Guardians in exchange for left-handed pitcher Matt Wilkinson and other considerations. The trade was finalized on May 9, 2026.
